results.rendered_html: bhoja—deva m. N. of a celebrated king of Dhārā (who was a great patron of learning at the beginning of the 11th century, and is the reputed author of sev. works., esp. of a Comm. on the Yoga-sūtras, cf.  IW. 92 n. 2 ; 532  &c.),  Mn. ;  Kull. ;  Gīt.  &c.

results.rendered_html: bhojadeva (bhoja + deva) m. König Bhoja, Beherrscher von Dhārā am Anfange des 11ten Jahrh. n. Inschr. in  Journ. of the Am. Or. S. 7,25, Śl. 5 .  KULL. _zu_ M. 8,184 . ˚śabdānuśāsana n.  UJJVAL. _zu_ UṆĀDIS. 1,92 . Bhojadeva mit dem Bein. Vupya  RĀJA-TAR. 7,1538  u. s. w.
